Icons

Example Name Code

Phone Icon

This is Phone Icon token.		 --as-icon-phone

Document Solid Icon

This is Document Solid Icon token.		 --as-icon-document-solid

Document with Lines Icon

This is Document with Lines Icon token.		 --as-icon-document-lines

This is Document Invoice Icon token.		 --as-icon-document-invoice

This is Document Signature Icon token.		 --as-icon-document-signature

This is Users Icon token.		 --as-icon-users

This is Plus Icon token.		 --as-icon-plus
